headline: Earnings To Watch: Wabtec (WAB) Reports Q2 Results Tomorrow
summary: Rail equipment company Westinghouse Air Brake Technologies (NYSE:WAB) will be announcing earnings results this Wednesday morning. Here’s what you need to know.
